config.name: aruba_clearpass_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: aruba_clearpass_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Authentication (3002)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T10:59:49.804704

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local patterns = {
    timestamp = "^(%d%d%d%d%-%d%d%-%d%d %d%d:%d%d:%d%d),%d+",
    ipv4 = "(%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+)",
    details = "([^,]+)=([^,]+)"
}

-- Cached functions for performance
local match = string.match
local gmatch = string.gmatch
local format = string.format
local time = os.time
local type = type
local pairs = pairs

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with local vars
    local output = {
        class_uid = 3002,
        class_name = "Authentication", 
        category_uid = 3,
        category_name = "Identity & Access Management",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 300201,
        metadata = {
            product = {
                name = "ClearPass",
                vendor = "Aruba Networks"
            },
            version = "1.0"
        }
    }

    -- Extract timestamp with error handling
    local timestamp = record.timestamp
    if timestamp then
        local ts = match(timestamp, patterns.timestamp)
        if ts then
            output.time = ts
        end
    end
    
    -- Extract source IP with validation
    local ip = record.ip
    if ip then
        local valid_ip = match(ip, patterns.ipv4)
        if valid_ip then
            output.src = {
                ip = valid_ip,
                type = "ipv4"
            }
        end
    end

    -- Parse details into event params
    if record.details then
        local params = {}
        for k, v in gmatch(record.details, patterns.details) do
            if k and v then
                params[k] = v
            end
        end
        if next(params) then
            output.event = {
                params = params
            }
        end
    end

    -- Validation and cleanup
    if not output.time then
        output.time = time() * 1000 -- Default to current time in ms
    end

    -- Final validation of required fields
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handler wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end

-- Cache cleanup
local function cleanup()
    patterns = nil
    collectgarbage()
end
